(("Time-Restricted Feeding"[Mesh] OR "Intermittent Fasting"[Mesh] OR "time-restricted eating"[tiab] OR "time restricted eating"[tiab] OR "time-restricted feeding"[tiab] OR "time restricted feeding"[tiab] OR TRE[tiab] OR TRF[tiab] OR "feeding window"[tiab] OR eTRF[tiab]) AND ("Exercise"[Mesh] OR "Resistance Training"[Mesh] OR "High-Intensity Interval Training"[Mesh] OR exercise[tiab] OR "exercise training"[tiab] OR "resistance training"[tiab] OR "strength training"[tiab] OR aerobic[tiab] OR endurance[tiab] OR "concurrent training"[tiab] OR "combined training"[tiab] OR HIIT[tiab]) AND (randomized controlled trial[Publication Type] OR controlled clinical trial[Publication Type] OR "clinical trial"[Publication Type] OR randomized[tiab] OR randomised[tiab] OR randomly[tiab] OR trial[tiab] OR placebo[tiab] OR crossover[tiab] OR "cross-over"[tiab])) AND ("Adult"[Mesh] OR adults[tiab])

((("feeding window"[tiab] OR "eating window"[tiab] OR "restricted feeding window"[tiab] OR "restricted eating window"[tiab] OR "limited feeding window"[tiab] OR "limited eating window"[tiab]) OR ((("4 h"[tiab] OR "4-hour"[tiab] OR "6 h"[tiab] OR "6-hour"[tiab] OR "8 h"[tiab] OR "8-hour"[tiab] OR "10 h"[tiab] OR "10-hour"[tiab] OR "12 h"[tiab] OR "12-hour"[tiab]) AND (window[tiab] OR eating[tiab] OR feeding[tiab]))) OR ("16:8"[tiab] OR "18:6"[tiab] OR "20:4"[tiab] OR "time-restricted"[tiab])) AND (exercise[tiab] OR "exercise training"[tiab] OR "resistance training"[tiab] OR "strength training"[tiab] OR aerobic[tiab] OR endurance[tiab] OR HIIT[tiab] OR "concurrent training"[tiab] OR "combined training"[tiab])) NOT ramadan[tiab]

(("Time-Restricted Feeding"[Mesh] OR "Intermittent Fasting"[Mesh]) AND ("Exercise"[Mesh] OR "Exercise Therapy"[Mesh] OR "Resistance Training"[Mesh] OR "High-Intensity Interval Training"[Mesh] OR "Physical Conditioning, Human"[Mesh]) AND ("Body Composition"[Mesh] OR "Adipose Tissue"[Mesh] OR "Body Fat Distribution"[Mesh] OR "Anthropometry"[Mesh]) AND ("Adult"[Mesh] OR "Young Adult"[Mesh] OR "Middle Aged"[Mesh] OR "Aged"[Mesh]))

inclusion_criteria: Randomized controlled or randomized crossover trials; original peer-reviewed articles in English with pre- and post-intervention data and intervention duration ≥4 weeks.
Adults (≥18 years), generally healthy (no chronic diseases other than overweight/obesity), participating in structured aerobic, resistance, or concurrent exercise.
Intervention: time-restricted eating with a daily feeding window of 4–12 hours implemented alongside the exercise program.
Comparator: exercise-matched control with an unrestricted eating window; reports at least one body composition outcome (FM kg, BF%, or FFM kg).
exclusion_criteria: Non-randomized or uncontrolled designs; acute interventions (<4 weeks); protocols, reviews, or non–peer-reviewed publications; not in English; lacking pre/post data.
Populations including minors (<18 years) or individuals with chronic diseases or on related medications (beyond overweight/obesity).

Interventions not meeting TRE definition (feeding window outside 4–12 h), not combined with exercise, or with additional dietary prescriptions differing between groups (e.g., prescribed energy restriction or macronutrient targets); comparators not exercise-matched or with restricted eating windows.
Do not report body composition outcomes of interest (FM kg, BF%, or FFM kg).
screening_criteria.description: Screening criteria for randomized trials assessing time-restricted eating (4–12 h feeding window) combined with exercise in adults, compared with an exercise-matched unrestricted eating window control, reporting body composition outcomes (FM, BF%, FFM).

included_articles.title: Time-restricted eating and concurrent exercise training reduces fat mass and increases lean mass in overweight and obese adults.
Hypercaloric 16:8 time-restricted eating during 8 weeks of resistance exercise in well-trained men and women.
Effects of 8 wk of 16:8 Time-restricted Eating in Male Middle- and Long-Distance Runners.
Effect of Time-Restricted Eating and Resistance Training on High-Speed Strength and Body Composition.
Effects of eight weeks of time-restricted feeding (16/8) on basal metabolism, maximal strength, body composition, inflammation, and cardiovascular risk factors in resistance-trained males.
Four Weeks of 16/8 Time Restrictive Feeding in Endurance Trained Male Runners Decreases Fat Mass, without Affecting Exercise Performance.
Time-restricted eating effects on performance, immune function, and body composition in elite cyclists: a randomized controlled trial.
Efficacy of time restricted eating and resistance training on body composition and mood profiles among young adults with overweight/obesity: a randomized controlled trial.
Effects of Time-Restricted Eating on Aerobic Capacity, Body Composition, and Markers of Metabolic Health in Healthy Male Recreational Runners: A Randomized Crossover Trial.
Time-restricted feeding plus resistance training in active females: a randomized trial.
High-Protein Time-Restricted Eating Alongside Resistance Training Reduces Adipose Tissue While Preserving Fat-Free Mass in Women With Overweight: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
Impact of 16/8 time-restricted eating on body composition and lipolytic hormone regulation in female DanceSport dancers.
Flexible time-restricted eating combined with exercise in a free-living setting for middle-aged women with overweight/obesity: a randomized controlled trial.
